prompt: A worker rollout ignored values that operators can prove were present in the parsed launch record. One host was started with worker count 0 (the documented auto-size mode), while its startup summary reported 12 from the site file. A separate dry run that explicitly disabled audit output still showed audit enabled. Ordinary positive worker counts and enabled flags behave normally. Diagnose the precedence failure and make explicitly supplied command options survive resolution without disturbing defaults for options that were not supplied.
